scenarios.task: Turn a long-form article workflow into a social-card-making Skill.
scenarios.real_input: A 3000-word article, author avatar, two product screenshots, and a Xiaohongshu-first distribution goal.
scenarios.expected_output: A skill brief, route description, minimal SKILL.md, gotchas, eval cases, and visual safety checks.
scenarios.failure_case: Agent uses purple gradients, crops screenshots, repeats layouts, and puts text over faces.
scenarios.gotcha: Text must not cover faces, product UI, or key screenshot data.

scenarios.task: Turn customer follow-up SOP into an Agent Skill.
scenarios.real_input: Customer tiers, follow-up cadence, CRM fields, escalation rules, and forbidden promises.
scenarios.expected_output: Branching workflow, field schema, compliance gotchas, route evals, and escalation checks.
scenarios.failure_case: Agent over-promises, skips CRM fields, and fails to escalate sensitive customers.
scenarios.gotcha: High-risk users must be escalated instead of handled with generic reply templates.

scenarios.task: Turn a team's development discipline into a coding workflow Skill.
scenarios.real_input: Feature request, repository, test command, style rules, and PR checklist.
scenarios.expected_output: Plan-first workflow, minimal-change rules, test-first gates, validation commands, and review checklist.
scenarios.failure_case: Agent edits unrelated files, skips tests, and claims manual verification without evidence.
scenarios.gotcha: Do not mark work complete until the required verification command has been run or the failure is documented.
